name: lenovo-tidy-vscode
description: Lenovo DRJ custom Clang-Tidy rules for C++ (LSP-powered)

lenovoTidy.clangTidyPath.description: Absolute path to a clang-tidy executable matching LLVM 18. Empty = auto-detect (prefers the bundled lenovo-clang-tidy.exe).

lenovoTidy.pluginPath.description: Linux/macOS only: absolute path to libLenovoTidyChecks.{so,dylib}. On Windows this is ignored because the bundled lenovo-clang-tidy.exe has the rules statically linked.

lenovoTidy.compileCommandsDir.description: Directory containing compile_commands.json. Empty = auto-detect (scans build/, out/, cmake-build-*, .vscode/ and the workspace root).

lenovoTidy.compileCommandsSearchPaths.description: Relative directories the extension (and the LSP server) walk up from the source file looking for compile_commands.json. An empty string means "the current directory itself". First match wins.

lenovoTidy.autoConfigureCmake.description: When no compile_commands.json is found AND a CMakeLists.txt is detected, offer to run `cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON` automatically.

lenovoTidy.cmakeExecutable.description: Name or absolute path of the CMake executable used for auto-configure.
